steps.title: Use the colon signal
steps.content: Just before the underlined portion, the text says the mushroom appears to be "very selective." The colon signals that the underlined portion will explain what that selectivity looks like.

steps.title: Identify the structural role
steps.content: Choice A overstates the line as an explanation for the whole habitat relationship. Choice B invents a negative effect on trees, and choice C wrongly ties the underlined portion to uncertainty rather than selectivity. The underlined portion elaborates on the earlier characterization by showing that the mushroom grows on only a few tree species. The answer is D.
